login.title: Sign in to Pintap
login.subtitle: Use your Pintap account to continue.

signup.title: Create your Pintap account
signup.subtitle: Start sharing recommendations and earning commission.
signup.typeRecommenderHint: Share products you love and earn commission.
signup.typeMerchantHint: Connect your store and run campaigns with recommenders.
signup.terms: I agree to the Pintap terms of service and privacy policy.
signup.acceptTerms: Please accept the terms to continue.

verify.title: Confirm your email
verify.body: We've sent you a confirmation email. Click the link inside to activate your account.
verify.bodyWithEmail: We've sent a confirmation email to {email}. Click the link inside to activate your account.
verify.spamHint: No email after a few minutes? Check your spam folder.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to set a new password.
forgot.sentBody: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent a password reset link.
forgot.unable: Something went wrong. Please try again.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.expiredBody: This reset link is no longer valid. Please request a new one.

accountCreated.title: Account created
accountCreated.body: Welcome to Pintap! Your account is ready — you can sign in and start sharing recommendations right away.
accountCreated.note: Email verification is not required for now.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.body: Your account doesn't have permission to open {area}. Sign in with the right role or contact your administrator.

landing.subtitle: Pintap turns personal recommendations into tracked commerce links — monetize everyday recommendations.
landing.footer: Sign in to create referral links, manage store campaigns, or operate the marketplace.

confirm.subject: Confirm your email address for Pintap
confirm.body: please confirm your email address to activate your Pintap account.
confirm.fallback: If the button doesn't work, copy this link into your browser:
confirm.ignore: If you didn't create a Pintap account, you can safely ignore this email.

reset.subject: Reset your Pintap password
reset.body: click the button below to choose a new password for your Pintap account.
reset.fallback: If the button doesn't work, copy this link into your browser:
reset.ignore: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email.

admin.title: Platform overview
admin.subtitle: Marketplace health across all stores and recommenders.

user.subtitle: What would you like to recommend today?
user.quickCreateSubtitle: Paste a product or store URL.
user.noLinksDesc: Create your first recommendation link to start earning.
user.noShopsDesc: Shops you create links for appear here.

merchant.subtitle: Your store performance at a glance.
merchant.reconnectStore: Reconnect your store to keep tracking orders.
merchant.lowDiscountInventoryBody: {campaigns} running low. Add more codes to keep links earning.

links.title: My links
links.description: Manage your recommendation links and track performance.
links.noMatchDescription: Adjust your filters or create a new link.

orders.title: Orders
orders.emptyDescription: Orders show up here when customers buy through your links.
orders.statusSummaryDescription: Pending, confirmed, and cancelled attribution totals.

payouts.title: Payouts
payouts.description: Your earnings and payout setup. You can request a payout once your available commissions have reached 25 EUR or more.
payouts.requestNeedsBank: Add your bank details below to request a payout.
payouts.requestBelowMinimum: You can request a payout once your available commissions reach 25 EUR or more.
payouts.requestedToast: Payout requested — we'll transfer it to your bank account.
payouts.setupDescription: Set up your payout method to receive commission payouts.
payouts.requestDisabled: Payout requests are coming soon and will run server-side.
payouts.bankDetailsDescription: Add your bank account details so the Pintap team can transfer your earnings.
payouts.onFileDescription: Payouts are transferred manually by the Pintap team to this account.

profile.title: Profile
profile.phoneLocked: Phone can't be changed after account creation.
profile.socialDescription: Shown on resolver pages so customers recognize you.
profile.saveFailed: Could not save your profile. Please try again.

more.title: More
more.deleteAccountDescription: Your account will be closed and you will be signed out. Your links stop working and outstanding payout data is kept for accounting. This can't be undone.

help.title: Help center
help.contact: Email {email} and we'll get back to you.
help.contactSuffix: and we'll get back to you.
help.faq1a: Create a link for a product or store, share it, and earn commission when someone buys using your reserved discount code.
help.faq2q: How do I create a link?
help.faq2a: Paste a product or store URL on the Create page. If the store is connected to Pintap, pick an active campaign to reserve a discount code.
help.faq3a: Confirmed orders become available commission. Set up payouts on the Payouts page, then request a payout once you have an available balance.
help.faq4q: Why is a store 'not on Pintap yet'?
help.faq4a: Only merchants who have connected their store can run campaigns. You can still save a non-earning link for other stores.
help.faq5q: What happens when I delete a link?
help.faq5a: The reserved discount code is released back to the campaign so another recommender can use it.

createLink.title: Create a link
createLink.description: Paste a product or store URL to start earning.
createLink.chooseCampaignDescription: Reserve one discount code for this link.
createLink.noCampaignCodes: This store has no campaigns with available codes right now. You can still save a non-earning link below.
createLink.notConnectedTitle: This store isn't on Pintap yet
createLink.notConnectedDescription: You can still save a basic, non-earning link. Earning links require a connected store with an active campaign.
createLink.noCampaignDescription: Save a non-earning link you can connect later.
createLink.noActiveCampaign: No active campaign for this product right now. You can still save a non-earning link.
createLink.noCampaignCodes: All discount codes for this shop's campaigns are currently in use. You can still save a non-earning link and connect a campaign later.
createLink.trackingNotice: Clicks and orders on this link are tracked so you earn commission on attributed purchases.
createLink.termsNotice: By creating this link you agree to the Pintap recommender terms.

linkDetail.notFoundDescription: This link may have been deleted.
linkDetail.deleteBlocked: This link has sales or commissions and can't be deleted. You can deactivate it instead.
linkDetail.deleteDescription: The reserved discount code will be released. This can't be undone.
linkDetail.removeCampaignDescription: This releases the reserved discount code back to the campaign.
linkDetail.noCampaignConnected: No campaign connected. Connect one below to start earning.
linkDetail.switchDescription: This releases the current code and reserves a new one from "{name}".

noStore.title: Connect your store
noStore.description: Merchant features unlock once you connect a store to Pintap.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.emptyDescription: Create your first campaign to start issuing discount codes.
campaigns.disconnected: This store is disconnected. You can't activate the campaign until it's reconnected.
campaigns.stopDescription: Recommenders won't be able to connect new links. Existing links keep their codes.

campaignForm.name: Campaign name
campaignForm.destinationHint: Where customers land after applying the code.
campaignForm.termsPlaceholder: 20% off sitewide. One use per customer…
campaignForm.codesDescription: Generate codes or upload your own (one per line).

orders.title: Attributed orders
orders.description: Store orders matched to recommender links.

billing.title: Billing & funding
billing.description: Fund commission obligations to keep campaigns earning.
billing.notAvailable: Merchant funding is not available yet.

settings.title: Store settings
settings.updatesDisabled: Logo and domain changes are managed by the Pintap team for now.
settings.orderEmails: Email me on new attributed orders
settings.lowCodeAlerts: Alert me when discount codes run low
settings.notificationDisabled: Notification preferences will be editable when account settings are connected.

onboarding.title: Merchant onboarding
onboarding.description: Connect your store to start running campaigns.
onboarding.connectDescription: Add your store domain to unlock campaigns and order attribution.
onboarding.domainHint: Example: yourstore.com — https:// and www. are optional.
onboarding.completeDescription: Your store is connected and your first campaign is live. Head to the dashboard to manage campaigns and track performance.

orders.description: All attributed store orders and import events.
orders.unmatchedDescription: Orders received without a matching reserved code.

payouts.title: Payouts
payouts.description: Review payable recommenders and manage payout batches.
payouts.queueDescription: Move the available balance of {amount} for {name} into a queued payout batch?
payouts.markPaidDescription: Confirm you transferred {amount} to the recommender’s bank account.
payouts.cancelDescription: Release {amount} back to the recommender’s available balance?

salesImport.title: Sales import
salesImport.description: Import Shopify order CSVs and attribute sales to reserved Pintap codes.
salesImport.columns: Headers accepted: External Order ID, Ordered at, currency, order amount, discount code, order status.
salesImport.storeScopeHint: Optional. Use a store UUID to prevent cross-store code collisions.

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.payoutDescription: Payout configuration will be editable once payout settings are configured.
settings.limitsDescription: Platform limits will be managed from backend configuration.

resolver.temporaryBody: We couldn't load this link right now. Please try again in a moment.
resolver.unavailableBody: This Pintap link is invalid or no longer active.

account.passwordDescription: Change the password you use to sign in.
account.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
account.samePassword: New password must be different from your current one.

errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.profileNotReady: Signed in, but your profile isn't ready yet.
errors.uploadCodeRequired: Upload at least one discount code.
errors.duplicateLink: You already have a link for this exact URL.
errors.activeCampaignRequired: Only active campaigns can be connected.
errors.campaignStoreMismatch: Campaign must belong to the same store as the link.
errors.noCodesAvailable: No discount codes available for this campaign.
errors.noPayoutBalance: No available balance to pay out.
